description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Requirements, scenarios, and ADRs all render identically today regardless of whether they're new in this PR, modified, unchanged, or deleted. Add diff-aware status to the view-model and chips/sections in the renderer so reviewers can spot what changed at a glance.

Plan:
1. New module SpecLedEx.Review.SpecDiff: given a base ref, a subject id, and the subject's spec file path, fetch the base-ref content via git show, parse it, and compute per-id change sets for requirements and scenarios (added / modified / removed / unchanged).
2. In Review.build_view: for each affected subject whose .spec.md file is in changed_files, attach the change sets. Otherwise mark all items :unchanged.
3. For ADRs: classify each ADR id as :new / :modified / :unchanged / :removed by comparing the ADR file's existence and content between base and HEAD.
4. Renderer:
   - Each requirement / scenario row shows a NEW or MODIFIED chip when applicable.
   - Removed items appear in a dedicated 'Removed in this PR' section under the same tab.
   - Each ADR disclosure summary shows a NEW or MODIFIED chip.
   - Subject card header optionally shows a small 'changed spec' badge if the subject's spec file is in the diff.
title: Polish v2: change status chips on requirements, scenarios, ADRs
